summary: Regis Mado, the Talent-Swallowing Magician, is meeting with Sir Merbinguer to discuss a proposal. Regis wants to acquire the Body Strengthening Art from Sir Merbinguer and promises to complete it if he obtains the secret technique. However, Sir Merbinguer is hesitant to trust Regis, but eventually agrees to help after learning that Regis has the 'Emerald Eyes' passed down from his grandfather. Meanwhile, a war between humans and beastmen rages on outside, with the Premier of the city trying to protect both sides.
key_moments: Regis proposes to acquire the Body Strengthening Art from Sir Merbinguer
Sir Merbinguer learns that Regis has the 'Emerald Eyes' passed down from his grandfather
The Premier is trying to protect both humans and beastmen during the war
